## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `swift build` passes (Swift 6 strict concurrency)
- [ ] `swift build -c release` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] If the release pipeline changed, `bash Scripts/release.sh` produces a valid ad-hoc `.app`/`.dmg`
